prompt: An ancient, towering tree with massive twisted roots stands at the center of a lush mystical landscape, its roots curling into a rushing stream tumbling over moss-covered stones. Cradled within the vast dark-green canopy is a luminous golden orb casting warm ethereal light, enclosing a delicate silhouette of a tree of life. A colossal waterfall thunders down a rugged mist-wrapped cliff into the river beyond. The golden orb's soft warm glow contrasts with the moody overcast sky and the deep, rich greens of the surrounding forest. Photorealistic, cinematic lighting, high fantasy art style, intricate bark and water textures, 8k resolution.
